findings.title: toon-format/toon
findings.description: 🎒 Token-Oriented Object Notation (TOON) – Compact, human-readable, schema-aware JSON for LLM prompts. Spec, benchmarks, TypeScript SDK.

findings.title: openai/evals
findings.description: Evals is a framework for evaluating LLMs and LLM systems, and an open-source registry of benchmarks.

findings.title: open-compass/opencompass
findings.description: OpenCompass is an LLM evaluation platform, supporting a wide range of models (Llama3, Mistral, InternLM2,GPT-4,LLaMa2, Qwen,GLM, Claude, etc) over 100+ datasets.

findings.title: jeinlee1991/chinese-llm-benchmark
findings.description: ReLE评测：中文AI大模型能力评测（持续更新）：目前已囊括359个大模型，覆盖chatgpt、gpt-5.2、o4-mini、谷歌gemini-3-pro、Claude-4.6、文心ERNIE-X1.1、ERNIE-5.0、qwen3-max、qwen3.5-plus、百川、讯飞星火、商汤senseChat等商用模型， 以及step3.5-flash、kimi-k2.5、ernie4.5、MiniMax-M2.5、deepseek-v3.2、Qwen3.5、llama4、智谱GLM-5、GLM-4.7、LongCat、gemma3、mistral等开源大模型。不仅提供排行榜，也提供规模超200万的大模型缺陷库！方便广大社区研究分析、改进大模型。

findings.title: AgentOps-AI/agentops
findings.description: Python SDK for AI agent monitoring, LLM cost tracking, benchmarking, and more. Integrates with most LLMs and agent frameworks including CrewAI, Agno, OpenAI Agents SDK, Langchain, Autogen, AG2, and CamelAI

findings.title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
findings.description: Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with GPT-4.1-mini). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

findings.title: open-compass/VLMEvalKit
findings.description: Open-source evaluation toolkit of large multi-modality models (LMMs), support 220+ LMMs, 80+ benchmarks

findings.title: Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard
findings.description: A full-stack AI Red Teaming platform securing AI ecosystems via OpenClaw Security Scan, Agent Scan, Skills Scan, MCP scan, AI Infra scan and LLM jailbreak evaluation.

findings.title: THUDM/AgentBench
findings.description: A Comprehensive Benchmark to Evaluate LLMs as Agents (ICLR'24)

findings.title: FreedomIntelligence/LLMZoo
findings.description: ⚡LLM Zoo is a project that provides data, models, and evaluation benchmark for large language models.⚡

findings.title: xlang-ai/OSWorld
findings.description: [NeurIPS 2024] OSWorld: Benchmarking Multimodal Agents for Open-Ended Tasks in Real Computer Environments

findings.title: FreedomIntelligence/Awesome-AI4Med
findings.description: A curated list of medical LLMs, multimodal systems, datasets, benchmarks, and more. 🏥

findings.title: modelscope/evalscope
findings.description: A streamlined and customizable framework for efficient large model (LLM, VLM, AIGC) evaluation and performance benchmarking.

findings.title: beir-cellar/beir
findings.description: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Information Retrieval. Easy to use, evaluate your models across 15+ diverse IR datasets.

findings.title: Xnhyacinth/Awesome-LLM-Long-Context-Modeling
findings.description: 📰 Must-read papers and blogs on LLM based Long Context Modeling 🔥

findings.title: XiongjieDai/GPU-Benchmarks-on-LLM-Inference
findings.description: Multiple NVIDIA GPUs or Apple Silicon for Large Language Model Inference?

findings.title: harbor-framework/terminal-bench
findings.description: A benchmark for LLMs on complicated tasks in the terminal

findings.title: FireRedTeam/FireRedASR
findings.description: Open-source industrial-grade ASR models supporting Mandarin, Chinese dialects and English, achieving a new SOTA on public Mandarin ASR benchmarks, while also offering outstanding singing lyrics recognition capability.

findings.title: IntelLabs/fastRAG
findings.description: Efficient Retrieval Augmentation and Generation Framework

findings.title: evalplus/evalplus
findings.description: Rigourous evaluation of LLM-synthesized code - NeurIPS 2023 & COLM 2024
